title: SPECIAL EPISODE: The Ultimate Beauty Quiz
podcast_name: The Late Night Snacking Trivia Game with Justine Cullen
summary: Hey, Snacks! Welcome to The Late Night Snacking Trivia Game, the podcast that’s fuelled purely by vibes and pop culture residue. Today we are taking a trivia-fuelled trip into the world of beauty, brought to you by Mecca, in celebration of The MECCA Archive - a living cultural collection celebrating the way beauty tells our stories, shapes our identities, and reflects the times. You can explore the archive in-store and online right now, and join the celebration on October 11 for International Day of the Girl, when MECCA will launch The MECCA Prize - a $10 million commitment to gender equality. Head to https://www.mecca.com/en-au/archive/ We’ve got two rounds of questions today, plus five fast questions all about beauty through the ages, and a final flex to finish off.
